questions.question: What happened to Stephen at the end of his speech to the Sanhedrin?
Who was the young man watching over the coats of those who stoned Stephen?
In his speech, Stephen recounted the history of Israel from Abraham through Moses to Solomon.
Stephen said, 'Look, I see the heavens opened and the Son of Man standing at the right hand of _____!'
Stephen's last words were, 'Lord, don't hold this _____ against them.'
